response.justification: Szabo meets the 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong full-stack engineering across diverse domains with solid teaching and mentorship credentials. However, the role explicitly requires Director-level principal engineering with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products—areas where this resume shows minimal depth. Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at Acme is a positive signal but insufficient evidence of the AI strategy leadership needed for this role.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on experience across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and infrastructure engineering with proven ability to ship complex systems
Strong mentorship and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through workshops, conference talks, and multiple open-source projects showing ability to inspire and lead
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Acme shows emerging alignment with role's AI focus and ability to learn new domains
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI product development—recent Acme role involves infrastructure work, not AI strategy or product leadership
Currently at Staff engineer level; role requires Director/Principal-level technical strategy and platform-level decision-making at organizational scale
Limited evidence of cloud platform architecture expertise beyond basic AWS CDK usage; role emphasizes identifying future cloud product direction and strategy

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and product leadership gap
Seniority level mismatch (Staff vs Principal/Director IC)
Deep multi-domain technical foundation and mentorship capability
